changes: Sentinel: Duration has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Vengeance: Duration has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Holmgang: Duration has been increased from 6 to 8 seconds.
Raw Intuition: Duration has been increased from 5 to 6 seconds.
Shadow Wall: Duration has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Nebula: Duration has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Resource cost display: Cartridge cost will no longer be displayed on action icons.
Job Gauge: A sound will now play when the Powder Gauge is full.
Rockbreaker: Area of effect has been changed from a cone to all nearby enemies.
Mantra: Effect potency has been reduced from 20% to 10%.
Anatman: Now triggers the cooldown of weaponskills upon execution and cannot be executed during weaponskill cooldown.
Blood of the Dragon: Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 25 seconds.
Geirskogul: Potency has been increased from 270 to 300.
Mirage Dive: Potency has been increased from 250 to 300.
Stardiver: Potency has been increased from 550 to 600.
Mug: Recast time has been increased from 110 to 120 seconds.
Trick Attack: Potency increased to 350; vulnerability up effect no longer requires rear execution; effect potency reduced to 5%; effect duration increased to 15 seconds.
Aeolian Edge: Combo potency increased to 420; rear combo potency increased to 480.

Shadow Fang: Potency increased to 200; no longer a combo action; DoT changed to additional effect with increased potency (90) and duration (30s); no longer shares recast; recast increased to 70s; does not interrupt combos.

Ten / Chi / Jin: Duration increased to 6s; max 2 charges; triggers cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu; weaponskills trigger its cooldown; recast increased to 20s; Mudra status no longer renewed by consecutive inputs.
Ninjutsu: Recast is no longer triggered when executed or when mudra timer runs out; triggers cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu; recast reduced to 1.5s.
Fuma Shuriken: Potency increased to 500; triggers cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu; recast reduced to 1.5s.
Katon: Potency increased to 500; triggers cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu; recast reduced to 1.5s.
Raiton: Potency increased to 800; triggers cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu; recast reduced to 1.5s.
Hyoton: Potency increased to 400; triggers cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu; recast reduced to 1.5s.
Huton: Triggers cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu; recast reduced to 1.5s.
Doton: Potency increased to 100; triggers cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu; recast reduced to 1.5s.
Suiton: Potency increased to 600; triggers cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu; recast reduced to 1.5s.
Kassatsu: No longer resets Ninjutsu recast; charges removed; grants one free ninjutsu; recast set to 60s.
Armor Crush: Combo potency increased to 400; flank combo potency increased to 460.
Dream Within a Dream: Duration increased to 15 seconds.
Hellfrog Medium: Potency reduced to 200; potency no longer reduced after first enemy; Ninki cost reduced to 50.
Bhavacakra: Potency reduced to 300; Ninki cost reduced to 50.
Ten Chi Jin: Revamped to convert 3 mudra into ninjutsu actions; duration 6s; same ninjutsu cannot be used twice; cannot be used with Kassatsu; ends upon moving; recast increased to 120s.
Meisui: Ninki increase changed to 50; recast increased to 120s.
Goka Mekkyaku: Potency increased to 750; triggers cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu; recast reduced to 1.5s.
Hyosho Ranryu: Potency increased to 1,200; triggers cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu; recast reduced to 1.5s.
Bunshin: Revamped to grant 5 stacks where shadow attacks on weaponskills; duration 30s; Ninki increase per attack 5; Ninki cost 50; recast 90s; shadow attacks remaining now displayed.
Shukiho: Ninki increase reduced to 5.
Shukiho II: Ninki increase changed to 10; requirement changed to landing Shadow Fang or Aeolian Edge/Armor Crush combos.
Meditate: Max stacks reduced to 3; status has no duration; triggers weaponskill cooldown.
Hagakure: Kenki increase changed to 10.
Tsubame-gaeshi: Cooldown affected by skill speed.
Shoha: Potency fixed at 400; requires 3 stacks of Meditation; recast increased to 15s.
Higanbana/Tenka Goken/Midare Setsugekka/Kaeshi:Higanbana/Kaeshi:Goken/Kaeshi:Setsugekka: Added effect: Grants a stack of Meditation (up to 3).
Jinpu/Shifu: Combo potency reduced to 320.
Fuga: Range and radius increased to 8; cone size increased.
Yukikaze: Combo potency reduced to 360.
Meikyo Shisui: Status icon will now display number of remaining weaponskills.
Mage's Ballad: Adds 1% damage dealt buff to party.
Army's Paeon: Adds 3% direct hit rate buff to party.
The Wanderer's Minuet: Adds 2% critical hit rate buff to party.
Sidewinder: Potency increased (200 for 1 effect, 300 for 2).
Troubadour: Recast reduced to 120s.
Apex Arrow: Range/radius increased to 25; potency reduced to 120 (scales up to 600 based on gauge).
Venomous/Wind/Caustic/Stormbite: DoT potency reduced.
Refulgent Arrow: Potency reduced to 330.
Job Gauge: Sound will now play when Soul Voice reaches 100.
Tactician: Recast reduced to 120s.
Split/Slug/Clean/Heat Blast/Heated Split/Heated Slug/Heated Clean Shot: Potency increased.
Flamethrower: Cooldown affected by skill speed.
Job Gauge: Battery Gauge cost displayed on icons; sound plays when gauge reaches 100.
Cascade: Potency increased to 250.
Fountain: Combo potency increased to 300.
Rising Windmill: Potency increased to 300.
Bloodshower: Potency increased to 350.
Curing Waltz: Cure potency increased to 300.
Shield Samba: Recast reduced to 120s.
Job Gauge: Cost no longer displayed on icons; sound plays at 4th Fourfold Feather.
Triplecast: Status icon now displays number of remaining stacks.
Egi Assault I/II: Category changed to spell.
Bane: No longer spreads Ruination; now applies Bio III and Miasma III.
Painflare: Potency reduced to 130.
Tri-disaster: Deals 300 potency damage; Ruination effect removed.
Dreadwyrm Trance/Firebird Trance: Recast reduced to 55s.
Ruin IV: Potency increased to 300.
Bio III/Miasma III: DoT/base potency increased.
Summon Bahamut: Wyrmwave can be executed immediately.
Everlasting Flight: Duration increased to 21s.
Pets (Carbuncles/Egi): Potencies adjusted; specific ability durations/effects adjusted.
Enhanced Bane: Now always extends duration of Bio and Miasma to max.
Enhanced Outburst: New trait at lvl 76 increases potency to 90.
Enhanced Tri-disaster: Trait removed.
Pets: Now displayed in party list; Demi-Phoenix no longer targetable; all pet attacks are magic.
Acceleration: Effect applies to next 3 spells; duration 20s; recast 55s.
Moulinet/Enchanted Moulinet: Range/radius increased to 8.
Contre Sixte: Potency increased to 380.
Jolt II: Potency increased to 280.
Enchanted Reprise: Potency increased to 300.
Enhanced Jolt: Increases potency of Verthunder/Veraero to 350 and Verfire/Verstone to 300.
Job Gauge: Mana costs now displayed on icons.
Asylum: Range/radius increased to 8.
Temperance: Effect applied immediately.
Job Gauge: Lily/Blood Lily costs no longer displayed on icons; sound plays when Blood Lily blooms; Balance Gauge changed to trigger at 80.
Summon Seraph: Duration increased to 22s; 2s delay after summon before acting.
Embrace/Seraphic Veil: No longer execute when pet is set to Steady.
Consolation: Recast increased to 30s.
Combust/Combust II/Combust III: DoT potency increased.
Essential Dignity: Max cure potency increased to 1,100.
Aspected Benefic/Helios: MP cost reduced.
Minor Arcana: Automatically changes to Lord/Lady of Crowns upon draw.
Collective Unconscious: Revamped to create celestial ring; effects based on Sect (Regen/Damage reduction); duration 18s/20s; radius increased to 8; recast reduced to 60s.
Malefic IV: Potency increased to 250.
Various actions: Potencies and mechanics (like 50% reduction after first enemy) adjusted.
Final Sting/Self-destruct/Transfusion: Apply 'Brush with Death' status; cannot be used while under effect.
Off-guard/Peculiar Light: Revamped; now share recast timer; effects/durations adjusted.
Learning: Success rate increased.
Reprisal: Effect now applies to all nearby enemies; duration increased to 10 seconds.
Rescue: Recast reduced to 120s.
Significant adjustments have been made to PvP actions.
The silence enfeeblement now affects weaponskills.
Resolved an issue wherein the additional effect of the white mage PvP action Dia could be stacked.
Resolved an issue wherein the gunbreaker PvP action Rough Divide was executable even when bound.
Resolved an issue wherein the healer PvP additional action Protect would reduce damage from Adrenaline Rush actions.

new_content.name: YoRHa: Dark Apocalypse
new_content.description: The first installment in the new alliance raid series.

new_content.name: The Grand Cosmos
new_content.description: A new dungeon that players may enter with Trust NPCs.

new_content.name: The Minstrel's Ballad: Hades's Elegy
new_content.description: A new trial accessible via the Raid Finder.

new_content.name: New Game+
new_content.description: A feature allowing players to revisit previously completed quests and cutscenes.

new_content.name: Fellowships
new_content.description: A new social system for likeminded players to join together.

new_content.name: Ensemble Mode
new_content.description: A performance feature that helps ensure party members are heard in sync.

new_content.name: The Slice Is Right
new_content.description: A new GATE added to the Manderville Gold Saucer.

new_content.name: A Scandal in Komra
new_content.description: A Chronicles of a New Era quest.

housing.name: Trader's Cottage Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into an item shop. ※Can only be used with cottages on small plots of land.

housing.name: Trader's House Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into a trader's shop. ※Can only be used with houses on medium plots of land.

housing.name: Trader's Mansion Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into an item shop. ※Can only be used with mansions on large plots of land.

housing.name: Eulmoran Inner Wall
housing.description: A deep scarlet interior wall with a slightly rough texture for those estate owners who wish to recreate the opulence of Eulmore.

housing.name: Eulmoran Marble Flooring
housing.description: Smooth, elegant floor tiling made of deep green marble.

housing.name: Eulmoran Chandelier
housing.description: A bright and elegant ceiling light identical to those found throughout Eulmore.

housing.name: Armorer's Stall
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing. Place this stall in your garden to play at armorer whenever the mood takes you.

housing.name: Weaponsmith's Stall
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing. Place this stall in your garden to play at weaponsmith whenever the mood takes you.

housing.name: Jeweler's Stall
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing. Place this stall in your garden to play at jeweler whenever the mood takes you.

housing.name: Florist's Stall
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing. Place this stall in your garden to play at florist whenever the mood takes you.

housing.name: Baker's Stall
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing. Place this stall in your garden to play at baker whenever the mood takes you.

housing.name: Fruiterer's Stall
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing. Place this stall in your garden to play at fruiterer whenever the mood takes you.

housing.name: Greengrocer's Stall
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing. Place this stall in your garden to play at greengrocer whenever the mood takes you.

housing.name: Bookseller's Stall
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing. Place this stall in your garden to play at bookseller whenever the mood takes you.

housing.name: Enchanter's Stall
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing. Place this stall in your garden to play at enchanter whenever the mood takes you.

housing.name: Butcher's Stall
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing. Place this stall in your garden to play at butcher whenever the mood takes you.

housing.name: Indoor Oriental Garden
housing.description: A miniaturized version of a traditional Far Eastern garden, complete with stone bridge, bamboo, and deer scarer.

housing.name: Log Partition
housing.description: A partition designed in the style of a rustic cottage, reaching to the ceiling and so sturdy it may as well be a wall.

housing.name: Lakeland Chair
housing.description: A chair in the classical elven style.

housing.name: Leather Sofa
housing.description: This sofa is so luxurious that you will never want to get up.

housing.name: Hades Trophy
housing.description: An ominous reminder of an unforgettable encounter with Hades, featuring a hefty base and ever-ominous purple aura.

housing.name: Lakeland Table
housing.description: A table in the classical elven style.

housing.name: Oriental Chawanmushi Lunch
housing.description: A piping hot bowl of the classic Far Eastern dish.

housing.name: Golden Ewer
housing.description: A decorative metallic ewer that will bring a touch of decadence to any interior.

housing.name: Misplaced Mog Slippers
housing.description: These delightful slippers can be placed—or misplaced—almost anywhere inside your home.

housing.name: Basket of Flowers
housing.description: A simple basket of blooms that will work wonders in brightening up your home.

housing.name: Ale Tap
housing.description: Capable of producing a stream of delicious ale whenever you please.

housing.name: Allagan Tomestone of Frivolity
housing.description: Adds a dash of Allagan style to your interior.

housing.name: Tabletop Hat Stand
housing.description: Comes complete with its own orange, wide-brimmed hat.

housing.name: Necklace Display Stand
housing.description: This stand can be placed on almost any surface.

housing.name: Set of Liquor Bottles
housing.description: Seven bottles of varying colors and sizes.

housing.name: Stuffed Porxie
housing.description: Although porxies are generally created from animated clay, this stuffed version is somehow far more rigid.

housing.name: Il Mheg Flower Lamp
housing.description: A softly glowing light fixture crafted to resemble one of the many lovely flowers in the pixies' home.

housing.name: Macaron Cushion
housing.description: A cute cushion designed to resemble a popular pastry.

housing.name: Oasis Wall-Mounted Fountain
housing.description: A wall-mounted fountain that sends water tumbling into the decorative dish below.

housing.name: Imitation Long Window
housing.description: Its size and ability to illuminate your abode despite merely being mounted on your wall are sure to impress your guests.

housing.name: Shirt Display Rack
housing.description: The shirts placed upon this shelf are perfectly folded.

housing.name: Flooring Mat
housing.description: A large, square mat made from long wooden planks, perfect for decorating interior floors.
